name: chartlibrary-mcp
summary: Chart Library MCP Server — intelligence layer for stock pattern agents. 11 tools: search, cohort, analyze, context, explain, portfolio, anchor_fetch, decompose (conditional slice discovery), clusters (K-means on intraday resolution), live_search (raw-bars → historical matches), report_feedback. Conditional distributions with conformal-calibrated quantile bands, catalyst-aware metadata, and per-cohort decomposition + clustering for SMB/prop-trader-style conditional analysis.
